'''zadubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadbolt|deadbolt]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadbolt|deadbolt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zadubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædibith|zædibith]] || [[word:zædibij|zædibij]] || [[word:zædibish|zædibish]] || [[word:zædibi|zædibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadudubuth|zadudubuth]] || [[word:zadudubuj|zadudubuj]] || [[word:zadudubush|zadudubush]] || [[word:zadudubu|zadudubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadubuth|zadubuth]] || [[word:zadubuj|zadubuj]] || [[word:zadubush|zadubush]] || [[word:zadubu|zadubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadufbuth|zadufbuth]] || [[word:zadufbuj|zadufbuj]] || [[word:zadufbush|zadufbush]] || [[word:zadufbuf|zadufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadubuthu|zadubuthu]] || [[word:zadubuju|zadubuju]] || [[word:zadubushu|zadubushu]] || [[word:zadubuku|zadubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadubuth|zadubuth]] || [[word:zadubuj|zadubuj]] || [[word:zadubush|zadubush]] || [[word:zadubu|zadubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadubuthul|zadubuthul]] || [[word:zadubujul|zadubujul]] || [[word:zadubushul|zadubushul]] || [[word:zadubukul|zadubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadubuthuthu|zadubuthuthu]] || [[word:zadubujuju|zadubujuju]] || [[word:zadubushushu|zadubushushu]] || [[word:zadubuku|zadubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadubuthun|zadubuthun]] || [[word:zadubujun|zadubujun]] || [[word:zadubushun|zadubushun]] || [[word:zadubukun|zadubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadubuthuoro|zadubuthuoro]] || [[word:zadubujuoro|zadubujuoro]] || [[word:zadubushuoro|zadubushuoro]] || [[word:zadubukuoro|zadubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
